system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.

{"procName":"dbo.tr_dondathang_tienthanhtoan_update","body":"



CREATE PROC [dbo].[tr_dondathang_tienthanhtoan_Update]
( 
	@action int, 
	@maddh nvarchar(max),
	@tienthanhtoan float,
	@tientamung float
)
AS
BEGIN
--IF(@action = 2)
--	BEGIN
--		Declare @tientamunghienco float
--		select @tientamunghienco = ISNULL(tientamung,0) from tr_dondathang where maddh = @maddh
--		Update tr_dondathang 
--		set tientamung = @tientamung + @tientamunghienco 
--		where maddh = @maddh
--	END
--ELSE IF(@action = 1)
--	BEGIN
--		Declare @tienthanhtoanhienco float
--		select @tienthanhtoanhienco = ISNULL(tienthanhtoan,0) from tr_dondathang where maddh = @maddh
--		Update tr_dondathang 
--		set tienthanhtoan = @tienthanhtoanhienco + @tienthanhtoan
--		where maddh = @maddh
--	END


DECLARE @DONDATHANG TABLE
(
	maddh nvarchar(200)
)

INSERT INTO @DONDATHANG(maddh)
SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM([value])) FROM string_split(@maddh, ',')

DECLARE @tongtien float;
SELECT @tongtien = SUM(soluong * dongia) 
FROM tr_dondathang_chitiet
WHERE active = 1
	AND maddh IN (SELECT maddh FROM @DONDATHANG)

IF @tongtien IS NULL
	SET @tongtien = 0;

DECLARE @donhang nvarchar(200)
DECLARE CUR CURSOR LOCAL FOR
	SELECT maddh FROM @DONDATHANG
OPEN CUR
FETCH NEXT FROM CUR INTO @donhang
WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
BEGIN
	DECLARE @tongtien_donhang float = 0;
	DECLARE @heso float = 0;

	SELECT @tongtien_donhang = SUM(soluong * dongia) 
	FROM tr_dondathang_chitiet 
	WHERE active = 1 AND maddh = @donhang

	SET @heso = IIF(@tongtien = 0, 0, @tongtien_donhang / @tongtien)
	IF(@action = 2)
	BEGIN
		-- TẠM ỨNG TIỀN
		UPDATE tr_dondathang
		SET tientamung = ISNULL(tientamung, 0) + (@tientamung * @heso)
		WHERE maddh = @donhang
	END
	ELSE IF @action = 1
	BEGIN
		-- THANH TOÁN TIỀN
		UPDATE tr_dondathang
		SET tienthanhtoan = ISNULL(tienthanhtoan, 0) + (@tienthanhtoan * @heso)
		WHERE maddh = @donhang
	END

	FETCH NEXT FROM CUR INTO @donhang
END
CLOSE CUR
DEALLOCATE CUR


END
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.cur","dbo.string_split","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet"],"writesTables":["dbo.tr_dondathang"],"flags":["has-cursor","has-while"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
